task_completion.description: Set up Ekos capture sequence for 60-second exposures using Ha (Slot 5) and OIII (Slot 6) filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars Ekos capture module showing a sequence queue with 60s exposure times and filters set to Slot 5 (or Ha) and Slot 6 (or OIII).

task_completion.description: Save the captured optical exposures in target-specific optical directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing directories like 'Tycho/optical', 'Crab/optical', and 'Cas A/optical' containing multiple captured files (e.g., FITS files).

task_completion.description: Generate 0.5-degree FOV sky survey maps named 'thermal_dust.png' with a heat palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image viewer, KStars, or file manager showing 'thermal_dust.png' files with a warm/red/orange (heat) color palette in the '<Target>/survey/' directories.

task_completion.description: Generate 0.5-degree FOV sky survey maps named 'high_energy.png' with a cool palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image viewer, KStars, or file manager showing 'high_energy.png' files with a cool/blue/purple color palette in the '<Target>/survey/' directories.

task_completion.description: Document the findings in a summary report at ~/Documents/snr_correlation_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file 'snr_correlation_report.txt' with written content correlating the optical, thermal, and high-energy observations of the targets.

integrity.description: The agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the optical exposures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the KStars application and Ekos module actively running and capturing images, rather than terminal commands creating dummy files.

integrity.description: The survey maps are actual astronomical images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'thermal_dust.png' and 'high_energy.png' files show star fields or nebula structures, not blank canvases, solid colors, or unrelated web images.

integrity.description: The summary report contains original analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'snr_correlation_report.txt' describes astronomical features or correlations, rather than just copy-pasting the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The targets are Tycho, Crab (or Crab Nebula), and Cas A. The agent must use KStars/Ekos to capture 60-second exposures using Ha (Slot 5) and OIII (Slot 6) filters. The optical exposures should be saved in '<Target>/optical/' directories. Survey maps must have a 0.5-degree FOV, be saved in '<Target>/survey/' directories, and use heat (thermal_dust.png) and cool (high_energy.png) palettes. The final report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/snr_correlation_report.txt.
